steps.t: The Halls of Crafting are in the southern reaches of the Flaming Deeps in Moria, near Fil Gashan. Gornellon, a wary Galadhrim scout, wishes you to des…
Gornellon is outside the Halls of Crafting, in the Flaming Deeps. You should speak with Gornellon and inform him of your success against the Orc-draug…
